_comment: Processing pipeline constants. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH.

darken_non_white._comment: BT.601 luma threshold for the white test in darken_non_white / darken_and_binarize. luma = (R*c0 + G*c1 + B*c2) >> shift; pixel is white iff luma > threshold. Matches canvas cvtColorToGray + threshold(240). Canonical impl: crates/processing/src/image_utils.rs.
